input.question: Show me my equity portfolio with a detailed table of holdings including ticker symbol, number of shares, current price, market value, and portfolio weight percentage. Provide the total portfolio daily P&L with both the absolute dollar change and percentage change compared to the previous close. Include a sector allocation breakdown showing the percentage and value for each sector. Display the overall year-to-date (YTD) performance percentage for the portfolio.

data.title: Equity Portfolio Overview
data.subtitle: Summary of portfolio performance, detailed holdings, and sector allocation

blocks.title: Portfolio Performance

dataContract.description: Current NAV, daily P&L (absolute $ and %), and YTD return percentage

blocks.sub_question: What is the portfolio's current Net Asset Value (NAV), daily profit and loss in both absolute dollars and percentage, and the overall year-to-date return percentage?

blocks.title: Detailed Holdings

dataContract.description: Table of equity holdings with ticker, shares, price, market value, and weight

blocks.sub_question: What are the detailed equity holdings in the portfolio including ticker symbol, number of shares, current price, market value, and portfolio weight percentage?

blocks.title: Sector Allocation

dataContract.description: Sector breakdown showing market value and percentage of portfolio

blocks.sub_question: What is the breakdown of the portfolio by sector, showing both the absolute market value and the percentage weight for each sector?

metadata.question: Show me my equity portfolio with a detailed table of holdings including ticker symbol, number of shares, current price, market value, and portfolio weight percentage. Provide the total portfolio daily P&L with both the absolute dollar change and percentage change compared to the previous close. Include a sector allocation breakdown showing the percentage and value for each sector. Display the overall year-to-date (YTD) performance percentage for the portfolio.
